documents.title: Agent Message Board
documents.summary: # Agent Message Board Agents post handoff notes here with `gsd message <role> <message>`. Read recent notes with `gsd inbox` before starting work.

documents.title: Builder Agent
documents.summary: # Builder Agent Implement only the validated scope and keep changes aligned with the active GSD change. ## Before Work - Run `gsd inbox`.

documents.title: Planner Agent
documents.summary: # Planner Agent Clarify intent, maintain OpenSpec proposal quality, and keep implementation scope explicit. ## Before Work - Run `gsd inbox`.

documents.title: Release Agent
documents.summary: # Release Agent Prepare final report, release notes, and ship-readiness summary after ready validation. ## Before Work - Run `gsd inbox`.

documents.title: Reviewer Agent
documents.summary: # Reviewer Agent Review diffs, risks, spec alignment, and missing tests before handoff. ## Before Work - Run `gsd inbox`.

documents.title: Tester Agent
documents.summary: # Tester Agent Run verification, inspect evidence, and report failures with reproduction details. ## Before Work - Run `gsd inbox`.
